scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that _get_num_matches correctly handles m/z input with extra whitespace, blank lines, and mixed line endings, returning the same count as the clean input.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Prove that the function correctly counts unique matching m/z values even when the input string contains extra whitespace, blank lines, and mixed line endings.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: The function must parse each line as an m/z value after stripping whitespace and ignoring blank lines.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior may fail if it assumes exactly one m/z per line without trimming, or fails on blank lines.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
num_matches = _get_num_matches(db, mz_values, adducts, tolerance)
print(f'Number of unique m/z matches: {num_matches}')
result = num_matches
covered_requirements: Increase data complexity by introducing whitespace, blank lines, and mixed line endings in the m/z input string to test parsing robustness.
Scaled executable cases must expose the new requirement introduced by this operator.
